sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91819" key="purpere/gxei" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρπερέγχει</orth>, <sense id="n91819.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πῦρ πῦρ ἔγχει</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
